steps.title: Find the intercept value
steps.content:
At the $y$-intercept, $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the equation to find $s$.
$$s=625^{2(0)+2}$$
$$s=625^2$$
$$s=390{,}625$$

steps.title: Match the displayed value
steps.content: The equivalent equation displays $s$ as the base $390{,}625$. The answer is A.
